name: Prince of Persia
description: Cinematic platforming and action-adventure series created by Jordan Mechner, known for rotoscoped animation, palace traversal, traps, swordplay, and later time-manipulation mechanics.

eras.title: Cinematic Platformer Era
eras.description: The original games define Prince of Persia through rotoscoped animation, lethal platforming, swordplay, and timed palace escape.

eras.title: Sands of Time Era
eras.description: Ubisoft revives the series as a 3D action-adventure franchise centered on acrobatics, combat, and time manipulation.

eras.title: Modern Revival Era
eras.description: The series returns through modern action-platforming and reinterpretations of the Prince of Persia identity.
